label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the limited liability partnership* (in its home jurisdiction)
rationale: Foreign LLP's legal name in its home jurisdiction. Same key as LLP_MLLP-2 / LP_MLPA-12A — entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction convention applies.

label_verbatim: SECOND: (Check box only if applicable) This is a professional limited liability partnership** qualified pursuant to 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A
rationale: Boolean elect-in for professional-LLP status. Parallel to LP_MLPA-9's entity.is_professional_lllp (different entity type — LLP vs LLLP).

label_verbatim: SECOND: (used only when checkbox 18 is set) provide the following professional services:
rationale: Free-text services description. Required when entity.is_professional_llp=true.

label_verbatim: THIRD: …the fictitious name under which it proposes to apply for authority to do business in the State of Maine is
rationale: Fictitious name when the home-jurisdiction name is unavailable in Maine. Same key as LP_MLPA-12A.

label_verbatim: FOURTH (For a professional LLP only): All of the professional limited liability partnership's partners are licensed in one or more states to render the professional services for which it has been formed
rationale: Free-text recital confirming all partners are licensed for the relevant professional services. The widget is a text field rather than a checkbox; filers either enter a confirming statement or leave blank if not a professional LLP. Could be re-shaped as a boolean in a future redraft if attorney review supports that.

label_verbatim: [ ] Form FICT-4 accompanies this application.
rationale: Single yes/this-applies checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0; boolean binding. Boolean indicating Form FICT-4 is bundled with this application. Same key as LP_MLPA-12A.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: Date of organization
rationale: Date the LLP was originally organized in its home jurisdiction. Same key as LLP_MLLP-2 / LP_MLPA-12A.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: Jurisdiction of organization
rationale: Home jurisdiction (state/country) of formation.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: Address of the registered or principal office, wherever located, is: (physical location - street (not P.O. Box), city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single-line physical address of the principal/registered office (in the home jurisdiction or wherever located). Same key as LP_MLPA-12A.

label_verbatim: (mailing address if different from above) [principal office]
rationale: Optional mailing address of the principal office.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: The nature of the business or purposes to be conducted or promoted in the State of Maine is
rationale: Free-text description of activities to be conducted in Maine. Distinct from LLP_MLLP-2's entity.business_purpose (which is the LLP's general business activities) — this is Maine-specific.

label_verbatim: Commercial path: CRA Public Number
rationale: Maine SOS Commercial Registered Agent (CRA) public registration number — required when registered_agent.type='commercial'.

label_verbatim: Commercial path: (name of commercial registered agent)
rationale: Name of the commercial registered agent.

label_verbatim: Commercial path: (name of commercial registered agent)
rationale: Name of the noncommercial registered agent. Maps to the same canonical key as Text11 (commercial path) — only one path is populated per filing.

label_verbatim: Noncommercial path: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Maine physical address of the noncommercial registered agent (commercial path doesn't capture address — it's looked up via CRA Public Number).

label_verbatim: Noncommercial path: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Optional mailing address of the noncommercial registered agent.

label_verbatim: NINTH: NAME (contact partner)
rationale: Name of the contact partner — distinct from the registered agent (the contact partner is internal to the LLP; the registered agent is the agent for service of process). New key family for LLP filings.

label_verbatim: NINTH: ADDRESS (contact partner)
rationale: Business, residence, or mailing address of the contact partner.

label_verbatim: TENTH: The date on which the foreign limited liability partnership first did, or intends to do, business in the State of Maine is
rationale: Date the foreign LLP commenced or expects to commence Maine activities. New key for foreign-qualification filings; would also apply to MLLP-12 (parent form).

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: [ ] Commercial Registered Agent
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; enum_select value 'commercial'.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: [ ] Noncommercial Registered Agent
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; enum_select value 'noncommercial'.
